content:
- Completed story-12 task 02: the default long-lane E2E path now runs through one runner container, runtime-shape assertions are typed, and source-bootstrap rendering no longer shells out to nested Cargo from inside tests.
- All required verification lanes passed: `make check`, `make test`, and `make test-long` (with `make lint` equivalent to `make check`). Updated the task markdown to `<status>completed</status> <passes>true</passes>`, checked the plan boxes, and ran `.ralph/task_switch.sh`.
- Next, stage all changed files including `.ralph`, commit with the task-finished message summarizing the container-runtime refactor and green lanes, push, then stop.
